query:
SELECT bookTitle, authorName, 
  SUBSTRING(coverImageUrl, LOCATE('._', coverImageUrl), 20) as resolution_tag,
  CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END as has_s3
FROM book_profiles 
WHERE coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl NOT IN ('not-found','skipped','')
ORDER BY bookTitle
LIMIT 20;
command:

  CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END as has_s3
FROM book_profiles 
WHERE coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl NOT IN ('not-found','skipped','')
ORDER BY bookTitle
LIMIT 20;
